## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Breaking change

## Validation

- [ ] `dart format --output=none --set-exit-if-changed .`
- [ ] `flutter analyze`
- [ ] `flutter test --coverage`
- [ ] `dart doc --validate-links`
- [ ] `flutter pub publish --dry-run`

## Notes

Mention migration notes, docs updates, or follow-up work.
